problem: Managing multiple chronic conditions (diabetes, hypertension, MSK pain, behavioral health) requires fragmented solutions, leading to poor adherence, high costs, and suboptimal outcomes for patients with comorbidities.
solution: Integrated digital health platform combining connected devices, personalized coaching, and AI-driven insights for metabolic conditions (diabetes, hypertension, weight), musculoskeletal health, and behavioral health. Single platform approach with consumer-centric design delivering 4.9/5 App Store rating, 80% retention, and 3.4-6x ROI for partners.
